title: Query produces this error: !ERROR: Could not find %102.%102
description:
The query does not execute because an internal error (crash) occurs.

**To Reproduce**
To reproduce just run the query below:
select c, count(distinct b) from (
select 1 a, 'a' b, 'A' c
union all select 2, 'b', 'C'
union all select 3, 'c', 'C'
union all select 4, 'a', 'A'
union all select 5, 'c', 'B'
union all select 6, 'd', 'A'
union all select 7, 'a', 'B'
union all select 8, 'b', 'D'
union all select 9, null, 'D'
) T
group by rollup(c)

**Screenshots**
![image](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/86444458/123336896-d9836680-d51c-11eb-8f6e-2d5595f578f7.png)

**Software versions**
 - MonetDB version number [MonetDB 5 server v11.39.17 (Oct2020-SP5)]
 - OS and version: [Windows 10 Pro 64 bits - 20H2]
 - Installed from release package
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id Int32, name String, category String, value Nullable(Int32));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, category, value) VALUES (1, 'item1', 'A', 10), (2, 'item2', 'B', 20), (3, 'item3', 'C', NULL), (4, 'item4', 'A', 30), (5, 'item5', 'B', 40);
SELECT category, COUNT(DISTINCT name) FROM test_table GROUP BY category WITH ROLLUP;
SELECT category, SUM(value) FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL GROUP BY category WITH ROLLUP;
SELECT COALESCE(category, 'Unknown') AS category, COUNT(*) FROM test_table GROUP BY category WITH ROLLUP;
key_bug_features: Query execution fails due to internal error on rollup
